title: Chondrosea tenella
taxonomy: Chondrosea tenella belongs to the genus Chondrosea of the family Chondroseaceae. It is a species of lichen, specifically a type of crustose lichen. The exact classification may vary depending on the source or recent research, but it is generally classified as a type of non-vascular plant. Chondrosea tenella is often characterized by its small size and simple, crust-like appearance. Further research is needed to confirm the precise classification of this species.
